title: Battle of Onderon (disambiguation)
content:
There have been several battles taking place on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]] throughout galactic history, including the following:

==Canon==
*[[Invasion of Onderon]]
*[[Onderonian Civil War]], the battle that took place during the [[Clone Wars]].
*[[Siege at Onderon]]
*[[Onderon insurgency]], an insurgency carried out by [[Saw Gerrera]] during the [[Imperial Era]].
**An [[Attack on an Imperial patrol|ambush]] against [[Alexsandr Kallus' squad]]

==Legends==
*'''[[Beast Wars]]'''
**[[Battle of Iziz]]
*'''[[Freedon Nadd Uprising]]'''
**[[Funeral of Amanoa|First Battle of Onderon]]
**[[Second Battle of Onderon]]
*'''[[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]]'''
**[[Battle of Onderon (Great Sith War)|Battle of Onderon]]
*'''[[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]]'''
**[[Cleansing of Onderon]]
*'''[[Mandalorian Wars]]'''
**[[First battle of Onderon (Mandalorian Wars)|First Battle of Onderon]]
**[[Second battle of Onderon (Mandalorian Wars)|Second Battle of Onderon]]
*'''[[Onderon Civil War]]'''
**[[Blockade of Onderon]]
**[[Battle of Onderon (Onderon Civil War)|Second Battle of Onderon]]
*'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
**[[Battle of Onderon/Legends|Battle of Onderon]]
*'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
**[[Attack on the Imperial Army-Navy Ordnance Center]] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]
**[[Battle of Onderon (Galactic Civil War)|Second Battle of Onderon]] during the [[Operation Shadow Hand]]
